title: Day 10 Lesson 4 ( Video )Asking where is the trash can
html:
Day 10 - Lesson 4

ごみばこ の ばしょ を きく　(gomibako no basho o kiku)  = Asking where is the trash can

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ　(kyooshitsu) = Classroom

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters):  がくせい, せんせい (gaksee, sensee) = Student, teacher

For the new words in this video, please check the subtitles and refer to the vocabulary section.
